name: Lehsun Vali Jhinga- Prawns with Garlic & Chilies - India
recipeIngredient: 1 lb medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
1/2 tsp black or yellow mustard seeds
1 fresh hot green chili, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the prawns in a bowl. Sprinkle turmeric and chili powder over them evenly and rub into the shrimp.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat until very hot.
3. Add mustard seeds to the hot oil. As soon as they begin to pop (a few seconds), add minced garlic.
4. Cook the garlic, stirring occasionally, until it turns golden.
5. Add finely chopped green chili and stir once or twice.
6. Add the prawns to the wok and stir-fry them over high heat until they turn opaque, which should take about 2-3 minutes.
7. Sprinkle salt and chopped green coriander over the prawns, then toss everything together and serve.
